ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI-powered bridge connecting LLMs and advanced AI agents to the Unity Editor via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Chat with AI to generate code, debug errors, and automate game development tasks directly within your project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NethermindEth/nethermind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NethermindEth/nethermind
Language: c%23
A robust execution client for Ethereum node operators.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ardalis/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template: A proven Clean Architecture Template for ASP.NET Core 10

ns0:entry.ns0:title: creazyboyone/FastGithub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/creazyboyone/FastGithub
Language: c%23
FastGithub 是 GitHub 加速神器，解决 GitHub 打不开、用户头像无法加载、releases 无法上传下载、git-clone、git-pull、git-push

ns0:entry.ns0:title: d2phap/ImageGlass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/d2phap/ImageGlass
Language: c%23
🏞 A lightweight, versatile image viewer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/extensions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/extensions
Language: c%23
This repository contains a suite of libraries that provide facilities commonly needed when creating production-ready applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
Language: c%23
The official C# SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rocksdanister/lively
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rocksdanister/lively
Language: c%23
Free and open-source software that allows users to set animated desktop wallpapers and screensavers powered by WinUI 3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: s1t5/mail-archiver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/s1t5/mail-archiver
Language: c%23
Mail-Archiver is a web application for archiving, searching, and exporting emails from multiple accounts. Featuring folder sync, attachment support, mailbox migration and a dashboard.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
